description: Carbon Arc provides a platform for accessing structured commercial and analytical data, including ontology/entity discovery, query building, and downloadable data products. It also offers MCP-based natural-language access to that data through AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT.
summary: Carbon Arc exposes authenticated HTTP APIs for platform data access and an admin API, plus two authenticated remote MCP endpoints (`https://mcp.carbonarc.ai` and `https://mcp.carbonarc.ai/research`); docs also publish a Python package, but no CLI usage was confirmed.
